name: paper-reading-toolkit
description: Codex toolkit for academic paper reading, Markdown formatting, and Obsidian Academic Research archiving.

interface.shortDescription: Read papers, format summaries, and archive notes to Obsidian.
interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin that bundles a paper-reading workflow: deep paper analysis, clearer Markdown output, and Obsidian Academic Research note routing.
defaultPrompt: Use deep-dive to read this paper and connect it to my notes.
Archive this paper discussion to Obsidian Academic Research.
Use beautify-output to polish this paper summary into clear Markdown.
